markdown_summary:
# Persona Profile

## Communication Style
- Signals suggest the user prefers concise and structured, prefers direct and concise, avoids fluffy marketing language, and prefers json when it makes things clearer.

## Priorities
- Signals suggest the user prefers json when it makes things clearer, prefers local storage over cloud dependencies, and values local files and transparent behavior because i want the system to stay inspectable.

## Recurring Interests
- Signals suggest the user works on local-first writing tool for tabletop campaigns, often revisit long-running creative tooling projects, and often work in python from the cli.

## Working Preferences
- Signals suggest the user works on local-first writing tool for tabletop campaigns, prefers concise and structured, prefers direct and concise, and prefers json when it makes things clearer.

## Emotional Tone Preferences
- Signals suggest the user prefers direct and concise and avoids fluffy marketing language.

## Likely Goals
- Signals suggest the user works on local-first writing tool for tabletop campaigns.

## Avoidances
- Signals suggest the user avoids fluffy marketing language and avoids opaque black-box workflows.

## Contested Signals
- No heavily contested memories right now.

## System Adaptation Notes
- Default to concise, structured answers and use JSON or explicit formats when it improves clarity. (refs: ltm_97c142d058aa, ltm_4b8a345308ca, ltm_2b0baf9345a8)
- Prefer local-first, file-based, CLI-friendly solutions over hosted services or GUI-heavy ideas. (refs: ltm_8bacb9c052af, ltm_8415250fa921, ltm_5b0cb2e627ba, ltm_b3d1a2f233a8)
- Avoid hype, fluffy marketing language, and patronizing tone; keep the interaction grounded and respectful. (refs: ltm_db11dde7ccf1)
- Maintain continuity around recurring projects and connect new advice back to the existing project context. (refs: ltm_8bacb9c052af)
